posts.author: Gregeno33 (Greg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Add .item().subitem().uploadFile() to Board SDK so you can use Upload Files columns as a part of Vibe Apps

What are you trying to achieve

The monday.com Board SDK currently supports updating subitems via:
await board.item(parentId).subitem(subitemId).update({ … }).execute()

However, there’s no equivalent uploadFile() method for subitems:
await board.item(parentId).subitem(subitemId).uploadFile({ columnId, file }).execute()

This creates a gap for board view applications that need to upload files to
subitem file columns. The GraphQL API supports file uploads to any item
(including subitems), but the Board SDK wrapper doesn’t expose this functionality
for the subitem builder chain.
